arts.ttl: Ruud Van Nistelrooy confirmed as new Leicester manager
arts.sum: The Dutch coach spent four games in charge of Manchester United on an interim basis before Ruben Amorim was installed as the successor to Erik ten Hag

arts.ttl: Breaking: Leicester City confirm Ruud van Nistelrooy as new manager
arts.sum: For Van Nistelrooy, his debut as the club's manager will be next Tuesday night, when City host fellow bottom-half side West Ham at the King Power Stadium. Ben Dawson, Andrew Hughes and Danny Alcock, who were part of Cooper's staff, have been preparing the players since Tuesday and will be taking charge for the fixture in west London.

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy is appointed Leicester's new manager less than three weeks after leaving Man United - with the Dutchman set to watch Brentford clash from the stands
arts.sum: TOM COLLOMOSSE: Ruud van Nistelrooy will watch Leicester's clash with Brentford from the stands after signing a contract until 2027 to manage the Premier League strugglers.

arts.ttl: Brentford v Leicester: FPL team news + predicted line-ups
arts.sum: Team form, absentees and our predicted XIs The post Brentford v Leicester: FPL team news + predicted line-ups appeared first on Best FPL Tips, Advice, Team News, Picks, and Statistics from Fantasy Football Scout.

arts.ttl: Premier League: Predictions for all five games on Saturday
arts.sum: The Premier League reaches matchday 13 this weekend and Tom McGarry has collated our writers' best bets for all five games being played on Saturday.

arts.ttl: “Who do you think you are?” – Leicester City man has multiple critics in homeland, consistent action has been noticed
arts.sum: Leicester City defender Wout Faes needs to change his attitude and buck up his ideas, with pundits and analysts in Belgium less than impressed by the 26-year-old. Sporza cover a range of comments from analysts and pundits today, with the Leicester City defender not coming out looking well from it. The Foxes were beaten by The post “Who do you think you are?” – Leicester City man has multiple critics in homeland, consistent action has been noticed appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Thomas Frank baffled by Leicester City manager decision and rues 'terrible' timing
arts.sum: Brentford boss Thomas Frank does not understand Leicester City’s sacking of Steve Cooper and rues the “terrible” timing of the decision for his side. Frank does not have any players returning from injury for the game, with full-back Rico Henry, utility defender Kristoffer Ajer and winger Gustavo Nunes still sidelined.

arts.ttl: Team News: Brentford vs. Leicester City injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Saturday's Premier League clash between Brentford and Leicester City.

arts.ttl: Brentford vs Leicester Preview: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Score Prediction
arts.sum: Brentford will look to maintain their impressive home form when they welcome Leicester in the Premier League on Saturday. Ahead of the clash, we’ve made a prediction for the game, provided o...

Leaders Liverpool will believe they have a great chance to go 11 points clear of champions Manchester City on Sunday by beating the Citizens at Anfield as we reach week 13 of this season’s Premier League.
